recommendations: Implement a modular architecture to facilitate the separation of concerns and improve maintainability.
Use a Byzantine Fault Tolerance (BFT) library to handle the complexities of achieving consensus in a distributed system.
Employ a leader-based architecture to simplify the process of achieving consensus and reduce the complexity of the system.

dataFlow: Validator Module sends proposals to the Consensus Module
Consensus Module aggregates proposals and sends them to the Network Module
Network Module broadcasts the aggregated proposals to the network
